phase_in_plan: Milestone B — Residual Score Semantics v1 (contract + optional fields)

spectrum_rows_builder.summary: Adds RESIDUAL_SCORE_SEMANTICS_VERSION constant, deterministic invalidation_hint selector with fixed vocabulary {factor_validation_pit_fail, confidence_band_drops_to_low, spectrum_position_crosses_midline, horizon_returns_reverse_sign}, and bundle-horizon → recheck_cadence map. Each spectrum row now carries residual_score_semantics_version / invalidation_hint / recheck_cadence.

message_object_v1.summary: MessageObjectV1 gains three optional residual-semantics string fields defaulting to empty. build_message_object_v1_for_today_row forwards them from the spectrum row (or nested message override) so Today / Replay can surface them without disturbing Product Spec §6.4 required fields.

tests_added.summary: Eight unit tests locking the invalidation-hint priority order, recheck cadence coverage, spectrum row integration, and MessageObjectV1 forwarding + defaults.

non_goals_explicitly_declined: AI-generated free-form rationale in the invalidation hint string
making the new fields required (they remain optional so Q1–Q10 survey stays green)
